Video.summary: On a rainy day, the Wiggles and their friends paint pictures; Anthony introduces the letter A.
Video.title: Fruity Fun

Video.summary: Meet Captain Feathersword's pirate friends, go to a Wiggly concert, meet a koala with Jeff and more!
Video.title: Let's Have a Dance!

Video.summary: Australian cricketer Brett Lee shows how much fun cricket can be; Greg talks about beach safety.
Video.title: The Wiggle Way

Video.summary: Sing and dance to songs from around the world with The Wiggles as they take us to Japan!
Video.title: A Wiggly Concert

Video.summary: Celebrate Captain Feathersword's birthday; The Wiggles sing songs all about animals.
Video.title: Playing a Trick on the Captain

Image.alt: Playing a Trick on the Captain
Playing a Trick on the Captain
Playing a Trick on the Captain

Video.summary: In Dorothy's Dancing Alphabet, we see the letter G and Captain Feathersword shows the gorilla dance.
Video.title: The Gorilla Dance

Video.summary: Australian country music star Beccy Cole joins The Wiggles as they sing songs.
Video.title: Pirate Radio

Video.summary: Captain Feathersword borrows his friend's special nautical jacket; wearing hats in the sun.
Video.title: It's Sunny Today!

Video.summary: Come along on a picnic with The Wiggles; The Little Wiggles decide to go to the beach.
Video.title: Would You Like to Dance With Me?

Image.alt: Would You Like to Dance With Me?
Would You Like to Dance With Me?
Would You Like to Dance With Me?

Video.summary: Learn to say hello in many languages, and join The Wiggles at the Johnson's Space Centre in Houston!
Video.title: Hola Todos!

Video.summary: The Wiggles play a fun game of I Spy and then get outside with Captain Feathersword for ball games!
Video.title: Get the Rhythm of the Hips

Image.alt: Get the Rhythm of the Hips
Get the Rhythm of the Hips
Get the Rhythm of the Hips

Video.summary: Wags the Dog and Dorothy the Dinosaur explore flying animals; name some animals that can fly.
Video.title: Hear the Drumbeat

Video.summary: Discover various languages through songs sung in French by Dorothy the Dinosaur and Sam in English!
Video.title: Ding, Ding, Dong!

Video.summary: A sea adventure with The Wiggles; Irish dancing with the Wiggly dancers.
Video.title: Dance This Way

Video.summary: Wags and Dorothy play an energetic ball game encouraging children to work together!
Video.title: Surf, Sand and Sun

Video.summary: Jeff and Murray need help to paint a circus picture; Prince Michael searches for his princess.
Video.title: The Queen of the Land

Video.summary: Henry, Dorothy and Wags one the importance of learning to swim, demonstrating different strokes.
Video.title: Buzz, Buzz, Buzz

Video.summary: The group wakes to find Anthony with his imaginary turtle friend, Morty.
Video.title: Anthony's Friend

Video.summary: The Wiggles, gearing up for a tour, face a setback as the Big Red Car breaks down.
Video.title: Jeff The Mechanic

Video.summary: Zardo Zap, an extraterrestrial visitor, arrives at the Wiggle House and things go awry.
Video.title: Zardo Zap

Video.summary: On a hot day, Anthony's hair grows rapidly due to the heat; the Wiggles must find him a hairdresser.
Video.title: Haircut

Video.summary: After watching a spooky movie, The Wiggles mistake their visiting friends for a monster outside.
Video.title: Spooked Wiggles

Video.summary: Join The Wiggles in number counting while Wags and Captain Feathersword search for buried treasure!
Video.title: Counting & Numbers

Video.summary: Murray, Jeff and Greg enlist the help of Captain Feathersword and Wags to get Anthony back Wiggling!
Video.title: Dancing

Video.summary: The Wiggles join Dorothy for a picnic but there's one problem: she's lost her voice.
Video.title: At Play

Video.summary: Dorothy, Captain Feathersword and Murray tell some tall tales about the Wiggle Rainbow.
Video.title: Story Telling

Video.summary: The Wiggles relax and remember some of the fun times they have had with friends.
Video.title: Friends

Video.summary: Animals are our friends and possess a whole range of super senses that people don't have.
Video.title: Animals

Video.summary: When The Wiggles find their treasure chest, they think back to the fun times when they were younger.
Video.title: History

Video.summary: With some help from their friends, The Wiggles show that there are many different kinds of families.
Video.title: Family

Video.summary: Have fun learning about how eating food gives you energy to do things just like The Wiggles!
Video.title: Nutrition

Video.summary: The Wiggles teach Captain Feathersword about politeness, with a demonstration by Officer Beaples.
Video.title: Manners

Video.summary: The Wiggles are off to the beach, but they quickly realize the Big Red Car is totally full!
Video.title: Travel

Video.summary: The Wiggles love to play tricks; Captain Feathersword believes that Wags the Dog has a magic stick.
Video.title: Play

Video.summary: The Wiggles discover how parts of their bodies help them every day.
Video.title: The Body

Video.summary: The Wiggles show everyone how much fun work can be, writing new songs and sharing lots of laughs.
Video.title: Work

Video.summary: Imagination can solve almost every problem, and friends including Wags and Dorothy show us how!
Video.title: Imagination

Video.summary: While dreaming he's a cow, Jeff sleepwalks and goes "moo" all over Wiggle Town!
Video.title: Cows, Ducks & Penguins

Video.summary: Lilly Lavender visits the Wiggle House searching for a star for her next film.
Video.title: Lilly Lavender

Video.summary: The Wiggles indulge in food antics, with Anthony devouring everything!
Video.title: Food

Video.summary: Journey through Wiggle Town as The Wiggles visit their friend Dorothy.
Video.title: Safety

Video.summary: Learn about germs and the importance of being clean, from brushing your teeth to washing your hands!
Video.title: Hygiene

Video.summary: Officer Beaples must help The Wiggles find their ways to Dorothy's house when they get lost!
Video.title: Directions

Video.summary: Strangely, Captain Feathersword learns "doggy talk" and Flora Door is taking singing lessons...
Video.title: Communication
